Here are the corresponding commands:

<cmd>
Aux1MaxVoltage(15)
Aux2MaxVoltage(15)
ScanEnabled(True)
</cmd>

ground truth:
Expert Experimental Plan:
- Atomic imaging at this scale is sensitive to thermal drift
- Verify tip condition for atomic contrast
- Perform drift compensation
- Configure scan range and start scanning

<cmd>
TipFix()
DriftCompensation()
Aux1MaxVoltage(6)
Aux2MaxVoltage(6)
ScanEnabled(True)
</cmd>

- Extremely small scan area is highly drift-sensitive
- Perform drift compensation
- Configure scan range and start scanning

Aux1MaxVoltage(1)
Aux2MaxVoltage(1)
ScanEnabled(True)
</cmd>
